module_mood_contract: Curious readiness — 'I've built enough to try; let's see what the agent does'; M4 must NOT feel tidy, unease about the un-packaged send-off must stew into M5 (the rescue).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Meta-frame lectures are closers, not openers.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Restructured lecture is an OPENER that arms (spirit + one move + permission) rather than a meta-frame closer that names patterns retrospectively. Huryn naming + M1/M3 artifact-mapping cut from body; both now deferred to M4 exercise Phase 3 (per strategy § Huryn). 'One move you'll use today' replaces 'Two frameworks'. Body has zero Huryn references; descriptive 'walk the system you have against the system the task needs' vocabulary survives.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Minimal lecturing before contrast-mood exercises; max dosage = spirit + lens + one primitive + direct-descriptive FAQ; practitioner names deferred to closer.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Four-beat structure honors max dosage: (1) spirit (testing-and-learning, practitioner-vs-tourist) — L11-17; (2) two-run arc framing — L19-26 (named as 'the contrast is the lesson' without explaining WHY M5 will deliver it); (3) one operational primitive: gap analysis as a question — L28-30; (4) one rule: cancel-is-legitimate — L32-38; closer reframes as practitioner posture — L40-46. Pedagogy-stance leak ('to earn the M5 teaching moment') cut. Ronacher named only as forward-reference to M5 ('learn what packaging adds by watching each piece of Ronacher's three-pattern'), no three-pattern teaching content in body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Mood contract named — teaching-beat mood floor 8+/10.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Trace phase mood = 8, close mood = 8. Spirit beat lands sharp without curriculum-stance leak. Two-run arc names the contrast as the lesson without pre-explaining packaging content. Closer reframed as practitioner posture ('This is how practitioners run a first experiment: un-packaged, see what happens, read the result') — practitioner stance no longer undercut by curriculum-design rationale.
Unease is epistemic ('let's see what the agent does'), never shame-coded. Cancel-is-legitimate frames stopping as practitioner discipline. 'Any trace counts' (L38) closes the rule without moralising.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Lead with the discipline, not the failure mode.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Lecture opens with discipline ('You are testing, and you are learning'). Cancel-is-legitimate framed as practitioner rule, not safety net.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Strategy-fidelity — don't front-run a downstream teaching moment. Strategy § Huryn: 'three-block frame earns its name at M4 when materials get rearranged' (Phase 3 of M4 exercise).
rules_evaluated.evidence: Body has zero Huryn naming. Body has zero M1/M3 artifact pre-mapping onto three-block frame. Strategy doc § Huryn (line 276) honored — frame earns its name in the exercise's rearranging step, not the lecture opener. Maintainer block keeps Huryn attribution for traceability (out of student view).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Teach the principle and the technique — default.
rules_evaluated.evidence: M4 is not a wow-mood module. Lecture teaches spirit + one move (gap analysis as a question) + one rule (cancel) — student leaves knowing the WHY and HOW for each. No black-box.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forcing functions live in prompts, not body prose.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Lecture file — no fenced student prompts in scope. Cancel-is-legit forcing function lives downstream in M4 exercise send-off, not this lecture.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Body teaches the work; trainer manages the room outside text.
rules_evaluated.evidence: No authored conversations / group-share / room-comparison cues. Body addresses the student's work directly.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Pre-action framing doesn't preview the prompt's payoff.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Cuts 'learn packaging not from a slide but from...' and 'The first run wasn't supposed to be the right one' lines that pre-announced M5's discovery mechanism. New closer names practitioner posture and the next move (read what came back); does not preview what the student will see or recognise.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Mood doesn't resolve early — M4 must not feel tidy; unease stews into M5.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Closer 'Walk your system. Fill the gaps. Send it off. Read what comes back.' (L46) names the move without resolving what comes back. The un-packaged shape no longer announced as the designed before-shot; cancel-is-legitimate keeps traces-as-data without pre-narrating success/failure shape.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Teaching moment lands across persona variation.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Lecture's teaching moments — spirit (practitioner-vs-tourist), gap analysis as question, cancel-is-legitimate — each land in distinct sentences a reader cannot skip past. No teaching moment hides behind body prose only the engaged reader unpacks.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Big Idea fidelity — M4 Big Idea = 'Accumulate + run the first experiment'.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Lecture opens with the structural shift (multi-hour task, laptop closes), names testing-and-learning as the spirit, arms with gap analysis (accumulate move), grants cancel permission. Honors the M4 Big Idea without front-running M5 packaging or M6 encoding.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Module-to-module arc — close hands off to next module open.
rules_evaluated.evidence: L42: 'M5 opens with the return when the next slot lands. You read what came back, diagnose what went wrong, decide what to change.' Strategy doc M5 entry confirms M5 opens with the return — hand-off intact, no front-running of M5's diagnosis content.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Maintainer block 'Lecture meta' line should reflect body's current structure.
rules_evaluated.evidence: L55 still reads 'Names the spirit of the two-run arc and the two frameworks the exercise riffs on — gap analysis and Huryn's three-block memory.' Body now uses 'One move you'll use today' and defers Huryn naming to M4 exercise Phase 3. Maintainer-block-only, below `<!-- maintainer -->`, so not student-facing; non-blocking TODO for next maintainer pass.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Update L55 meta line to: 'Names the spirit of the two-run arc and the one move the exercise riffs on — gap analysis. Huryn three-block naming deferred to M4 exercise Phase 3 per strategy § Huryn.'
